data.description: Apple Accelerates Production Of More Affordable iPhone 17

data.title: Crude oil falls 1%; Nasdaq gains 100 points. Lennar earnings miss estimates. Dow up 0.34% to 46,297.65 and NASDAQ up 0.45% to 22,572.34. S&P 500 rises 0.31% to 6,652.30. Energy stocks decline by 1%. Top Headline: Lennar Corp. reports earnings miss with adjusted earnings at $2 per share and revenue at $8.81 billion. AGM Group Holdings Inc. shares surge 378% to $10.67.
data.description: U.S. stocks experienced gains towards the end of trading on Friday, with the Nasdaq Composite rising by around 100 points. The Dow increased by 0.34% to 46,297.65, the NASDAQ went up by 0.45% to 22,572.34, and the S&P 500 rose by 0.31% to 6,652.30. Consumer discretionary shares saw a significant jump of 0.8%, while energy stocks fell by 1%. Lennar Corp. (NYSE: LEN) reported weaker-than-expected third-quarter results, with adjusted earnings of $2 per share missing the consensus estimate of $2.10, and revenue of $8.81 billion failing to meet the Street estimate of $8.99 billion. Additionally, AGM Group Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AGMH) saw a surge in its shares by 378% to $10.67 after the filing of Form 6-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Price forecasts 9/19: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE, LINK, AVAX. Bitcoin aiming $115,500 support while altcoins show upward trend.
data.description: Bitcoin encountered significant selling pressure when it reached $117,500, highlighting a crucial point for bulls to keep the BTC price above $115,500. Altcoins, on the other hand, are predicted to see an increase in value.

data.title: DOJ closes investigation on BAPS Temple in New Jersey as CoHNA demands accountability over unproven allegations.
data.description: The Coalition of Hindus of North America (CoHNA) in Trenton, NJ on September 19, 2025, urged for accountability from media, activists, and institutions for using unproven allegations to vilify the Hindu community. The US Department of Justice's recent decision to close the case was welcomed by CoHNA.

data.title: Vishay to showcase solutions for AI and EV at PCIM Asia 2025 with various product demos and reference designs.
data.description: The company will showcase a wide range of semiconductor and passive technologies through various reference designs and product demonstrations. These will be centered around AI servers, smart cockpits, vehicle computing platforms, and other applications. The showcase will emphasize the company's diverse portfolio of technologies aimed at these sectors.

data.title: 3Ei Recruiter is an AI agent introduced by 3 Enrollment Marketing on Sept. 19, 2025, focused on guiding students with empathy.
data.description: In Rexford, N.Y. on September 19, 2025, 3 Enrollment Marketing introduced 3Ei Recruiter, an Artificial Intelligence agent tailored to assist potential students in their enrollment process. This innovative tool offers empathetic and brand-specific guidance, marking a significant advancement in the industry.

data.title: InventHelp inventors create new CART PHONE HOLDER for shopping carts; handsfree design secures phone. Valencia inventors innovate. Next-gen cart convenience.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, two inventors from Valencia, Calif., shared their innovation of the Cart Phone Holder. This specially designed clip allows users to secure their phones to a shopping cart's basket or handle. The hands-free design aims to provide convenience for users when shopping, enabling easy viewing of their devices. This invention offers a solution for those looking to keep their phones secure and accessible while on the go.

data.title: DENSO collaborates to unveil pavilion and arboretum in Maryville, celebrating 35 years with community, team members.
data.description: DENSO Manufacturing Tennessee, Inc. (DMTN) is marking 35 years in Maryville with a celebration honoring team members and the community. The company is partnering with the City of Maryville, Leadership Blount, and the Downtown area to support local community spaces. This event in Maryville, Tennessee on September 19, 2025 showcases DENSO's commitment to the city, commemorating this milestone by giving back to the community.

data.title: Flexsteel Industries will join Lytham Partners Fall 2025 conference on Sep 30, 2025 in DUBUQUE, Iowa. Company is one of the largest furniture manufacturers in the US (NASDAQ: FLXS).
data.description: Flexsteel Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLXS), a major manufacturer, importer, and marketer of residential furniture in the U.S., revealed its involvement in the Lytham Partners Fall 2025 Investor Conference scheduled for September 30, 2025. At the event, they will conduct a webcast presentation and engage in individual meetings with investors. The conference will be virtual, allowing widespread participation. This will offer the opportunity for investors to gain insights into Flexsteel's operations and future prospects. The Company's participation reflects its commitment to engaging with stakeholders and showcasing its market position.

data.title: With new crypto treasuries and SEC reforms, institutional demand rises. Public firms raise millions, signaling another altcoin boom.
data.description: Publicly traded companies are securing substantial amounts of capital, totaling hundreds of millions, to invest in cryptocurrency strategies. This move is bolstering investor beliefs in the emergence of a significant altcoin market cycle similar to previous historic trends.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson's Tecvayli-Darzalex combo shows 100% response in 49 newly diagnosed myeloma patients via immune-based induction regimen.
data.description: Johnson & Johnson disclosed that a study involving Tecvayli and Darzalex Faspro displayed significant effectiveness in recently diagnosed multiple myeloma patients eligible for transplantation. A total of 49 patients participated in the study, divided into three treatment groups. Utilizing a steroid-sparing strategy, these patients received Tecvayli with Darzalex Faspro and lenalidomide, with or without bortezomib. All patients in each treatment arm attained an overall response rate of at least partial response after induction therapy. Out of 46 patients assessed for minimal residual disease (MRD) with available samples,... (The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Stephen Miran, new to Fed, advocates deeper interest rate cut. Stresses independence from White House in first remarks.
data.description: Stephen Miran, following his recent appointment to the Federal Reserve Board, stressed the importance of his autonomy from the White House in his inaugural remarks.

data.title: macOS 13 runner image on GitHub to be retired by Dec 2025, deprecation begins Dec 4 with scheduled brownouts.
data.description: GitHub has revealed plans to retire the macOS 13 runner image by December 4, 2025. In preparation for this deprecation, there will be scheduled brownouts to alert users of the upcoming change. This move signifies a shift in GitHub's support strategy, aiming to enhance awareness about the alteration.

data.title: Teamsters in Tampa and Jacksonville ratify Florida Driver's Agreement, covering 49 delivery drivers at Southern Glazer's with higher wages and improved benefits.
data.description: Delivery drivers in Tampa and Jacksonville have successfully negotiated improved wages and benefits through the Florida Driver's Agreement. The collective bargaining agreement, ratified by Teamsters, encompasses 49 delivery drivers employed at Southern Glazer's. This advancement signifies a positive change in the working conditions of these drivers, with updated terms ensuring better pay and benefits for them. The increased benefits and wages are expected to have a significant impact on the livelihoods of these essential workers in the Tampa and Jacksonville areas.
